Class MetadataService

java.lang.Object
com.linecorp.centraldogma.server.metadata.MetadataService
public class MetadataService extends Object
A service class for metadata management.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    METADATA_JSON
    A path of metadata file.
    static final String
    TOKEN_JSON
    A path of token list file.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a new instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    activateCertificate(Author author, String appId)
    Activates the CertificateAppIdentity of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    activateToken(Author author, String appId)
    Activates the Token of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    addAppIdentity(Author author, String projectName, String appId, ProjectRole role)
    Adds an AppIdentity of the specified appId to the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    addAppIdentityRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, String appId, RepositoryRole role)
    Adds the RepositoryRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId to the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    addMember(Author author, String projectName, User member, ProjectRole projectRole)
    Adds the specified member to the ProjectMetadata of the specified projectName with the specified projectRole.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    addRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
    Adds a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName to the specified projectName with a default RepositoryRole.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    addRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, ProjectRoles projectRoles)
    Adds a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName to the specified projectName with the specified ProjectRoles.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    addRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, RepositoryMetadata repositoryMetadata)
    Adds a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName to the specified projectName with a default RepositoryRole.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    addUserRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, User member, RepositoryRole role)
    Adds the RepositoryRole for the specified member to the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    createCertificate(Author author, String appId, String certificateId, boolean isSystemAdmin)
    Creates a new app identity CertificateAppIdentity with the specified appId and certificateId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    createToken(Author author, String appId)
    Creates a new user-level Token with the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    createToken(Author author, String appId, boolean isSystemAdmin)
    Creates a new Token with the specified appId, isSystemAdmin and an auto-generated secret.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    createToken(Author author, String appId, String secret)
    Creates a new user-level Token with the specified appId and secret.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    createToken(Author author, String appId, String secret, boolean isSystemAdmin)
    Creates a new Token with the specified appId, secret and isSystemAdmin.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    deactivateCertificate(Author author, String appId)
    Deactivates the CertificateAppIdentity of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    deactivateToken(Author author, String appId)
    Deactivates the Token of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    destroyCertificate(Author author, String appId)
    Removes the CertificateAppIdentity of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    destroyToken(Author author, String appId)
    Removes the Token of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<AppIdentityRegistry>
    fetchAppIdentityRegistry()
    Fetches the AppIdentityRegistry from the repository.
    AppIdentity
    findAppIdentity(String appId)
    Returns an AppIdentity which has the specified appId.
    CertificateAppIdentity
    findCertificateById(String certificateId)
    Returns a CertificateAppIdentity which has the specified certificateId.
    CompletableFuture<ProjectRole>
    findProjectRole(String projectName, User user)
    Finds a ProjectRole of the specified User in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<RepositoryRole>
    findRepositoryRole(String projectName, String repoName, AppIdentity appIdentity)
    Finds RepositoryRole of the specified Token from the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<RepositoryRole>
    findRepositoryRole(String projectName, String repoName, User user)
    Finds RepositoryRole of the specified User or UserWithAppIdentity from the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    Token
    findTokenBySecret(String secret)
    Returns a Token which has the specified secret.
    AppIdentityRegistry
    getAppIdentityRegistry()
    Returns an AppIdentityRegistry.
    CompletableFuture<Member>
    getMember(String projectName, User user)
    Returns a Member if the specified User is a member of the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<ProjectMetadata>
    getProject(String projectName)
    Returns a ProjectMetadata whose name equals to the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<RepositoryMetadata>
    getRepo(String projectName, String repoName)
    Returns a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    Revision
    purgeAppIdentity(Author author, String appId)
    Purges the AppIdentity of the specified appId that was removed before.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    purgeRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
    Purges a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName from the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    removeAppIdentityFromProject(Author author, String projectName, String appId)
    Removes the AppIdentity of the specified appId from the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    removeAppIdentityRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, String appId)
    Removes the RepositoryRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    removeMember(Author author, String projectName, User user)
    Removes the specified user from the ProjectMetadata in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    removeProject(Author author, String projectName)
    Removes a ProjectMetadata whose name equals to the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    removeRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
    Removes a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName from the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    removeUserRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, User member)
    Removes the RepositoryRole for the specified member from the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    restoreProject(Author author, String projectName)
    Restores a ProjectMetadata whose name equals to the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    restoreRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
    Restores a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    updateAppIdentityLevel(Author author, String appId, boolean toBeSystemAdmin)
    Updates the app identity level of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    updateAppIdentityRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, String appId, RepositoryRole role)
    Updates the RepositoryRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    updateAppIdentityRole(Author author, String projectName, AppIdentity appIdentity, ProjectRole role)
    Updates a ProjectRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    updateMemberRole(Author author, String projectName, User member, ProjectRole projectRole)
    Updates a ProjectRole for the specified member in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    updateRepositoryProjectRoles(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, ProjectRoles projectRoles)
    Updates the member and guest RepositoryRole of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    updateRepositoryStatus(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, RepositoryStatus repositoryStatus)
    Updates the ServerStatus of the specified repoName.
    CompletableFuture<Revision>
    updateUserRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, User member, RepositoryRole role)
    Updates the RepositoryRole for the specified member of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

      public static final String METADATA_JSON
      A path of metadata file.

  • Constructor Details

    • MetadataService

      public MetadataService(ProjectManager projectManager, CommandExecutor executor, InternalProjectInitializer projectInitializer)
      Creates a new instance.

  • Method Details

    • getProject

      public CompletableFuture<ProjectMetadata> getProject(String projectName)
      Returns a ProjectMetadata whose name equals to the specified projectName.

    • removeProject

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> removeProject(Author author, String projectName)
      Removes a ProjectMetadata whose name equals to the specified projectName.

    • restoreProject

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> restoreProject(Author author, String projectName)
      Restores a ProjectMetadata whose name equals to the specified projectName.

    • getMember

      public CompletableFuture<Member> getMember(String projectName, User user)
      Returns a Member if the specified User is a member of the specified projectName.

    • addMember

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> addMember(Author author, String projectName, User member, ProjectRole projectRole)
      Adds the specified member to the ProjectMetadata of the specified projectName with the specified projectRole.

    • removeMember

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> removeMember(Author author, String projectName, User user)
      Removes the specified user from the ProjectMetadata in the specified projectName. It also removes the RepositoryRole of the specified user from every RepositoryMetadata.

    • updateMemberRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> updateMemberRole(Author author, String projectName, User member, ProjectRole projectRole)
      Updates a ProjectRole for the specified member in the specified projectName.

    • getRepo

      public CompletableFuture<RepositoryMetadata> getRepo(String projectName, String repoName)
      Returns a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • addRepo

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> addRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
      Adds a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName to the specified projectName with a default RepositoryRole. The member will have the RepositoryRole.WRITE role and the guest won't have any role.

    • addRepo

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> addRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, ProjectRoles projectRoles)
      Adds a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName to the specified projectName with the specified ProjectRoles.

    • addRepo

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> addRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, RepositoryMetadata repositoryMetadata)
      Adds a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName to the specified projectName with a default RepositoryRole. The member will have the RepositoryRole.WRITE role and the guest won't have any role.

    • removeRepo

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> removeRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
      Removes a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName from the specified projectName.

    • purgeRepo

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> purgeRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
      Purges a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName from the specified projectName.

    • restoreRepo

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> restoreRepo(Author author, String projectName, String repoName)
      Restores a RepositoryMetadata of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • updateRepositoryProjectRoles

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> updateRepositoryProjectRoles(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, ProjectRoles projectRoles)
      Updates the member and guest RepositoryRole of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • addAppIdentity

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> addAppIdentity(Author author, String projectName, String appId, ProjectRole role)
      Adds an AppIdentity of the specified appId to the specified projectName.

    • removeAppIdentityFromProject

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> removeAppIdentityFromProject(Author author, String projectName, String appId)
      Removes the AppIdentity of the specified appId from the specified projectName. It also removes every app identity repository role belonging to AppIdentity from every RepositoryMetadata.

    • updateAppIdentityRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> updateAppIdentityRole(Author author, String projectName, AppIdentity appIdentity, ProjectRole role)
      Updates a ProjectRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId.

    • addUserRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> addUserRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, User member, RepositoryRole role)
      Adds the RepositoryRole for the specified member to the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • removeUserRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> removeUserRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, User member)
      Removes the RepositoryRole for the specified member from the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • updateUserRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> updateUserRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, User member, RepositoryRole role)
      Updates the RepositoryRole for the specified member of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • addAppIdentityRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> addAppIdentityRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, String appId, RepositoryRole role)
      Adds the RepositoryRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId to the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • removeAppIdentityRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> removeAppIdentityRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, String appId)
      Removes the RepositoryRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • updateAppIdentityRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> updateAppIdentityRepositoryRole(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, String appId, RepositoryRole role)
      Updates the RepositoryRole for the AppIdentity of the specified appId of the specified repoName in the specified projectName.

    • findRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<RepositoryRole> findRepositoryRole(String projectName, String repoName, User user)
      Finds RepositoryRole of the specified User or UserWithAppIdentity from the specified repoName in the specified projectName. If the User is not found, it will return null.

    • findRepositoryRole

      public CompletableFuture<RepositoryRole> findRepositoryRole(String projectName, String repoName, AppIdentity appIdentity)
      Finds RepositoryRole of the specified Token from the specified repoName in the specified projectName. If the appId is not found, it will return null.

    • findProjectRole

      public CompletableFuture<ProjectRole> findProjectRole(String projectName, User user)
      Finds a ProjectRole of the specified User in the specified projectName.

    • fetchAppIdentityRegistry

      public CompletableFuture<AppIdentityRegistry> fetchAppIdentityRegistry()
      Fetches the AppIdentityRegistry from the repository.

    • getAppIdentityRegistry

      public AppIdentityRegistry getAppIdentityRegistry()
      Returns an AppIdentityRegistry.

    • createToken

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> createToken(Author author, String appId)
      Creates a new user-level Token with the specified appId. A secret for the appId will be automatically generated.

    • createToken

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> createToken(Author author, String appId, boolean isSystemAdmin)
      Creates a new Token with the specified appId, isSystemAdmin and an auto-generated secret.

    • createToken

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> createToken(Author author, String appId, String secret)
      Creates a new user-level Token with the specified appId and secret.

    • createToken

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> createToken(Author author, String appId, String secret, boolean isSystemAdmin)
      Creates a new Token with the specified appId, secret and isSystemAdmin.

    • destroyToken

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> destroyToken(Author author, String appId)
      Removes the Token of the specified appId. This sets AppIdentity.deletion() to the current timestamp. It will be purged later by purgeAppIdentity(Author, String).

    • purgeAppIdentity

      public Revision purgeAppIdentity(Author author, String appId)
      Purges the AppIdentity of the specified appId that was removed before.

      Note that this is a blocking method that should not be invoked in an event loop.

    • activateToken

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> activateToken(Author author, String appId)
      Activates the Token of the specified appId.

    • deactivateToken

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> deactivateToken(Author author, String appId)
      Deactivates the Token of the specified appId.

    • findAppIdentity

      public AppIdentity findAppIdentity(String appId)
      Returns an AppIdentity which has the specified appId.

    • findCertificateById

      public CertificateAppIdentity findCertificateById(String certificateId)
      Returns a CertificateAppIdentity which has the specified certificateId.

    • findTokenBySecret

      public Token findTokenBySecret(String secret)
      Returns a Token which has the specified secret.

    • updateRepositoryStatus

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> updateRepositoryStatus(Author author, String projectName, String repoName, RepositoryStatus repositoryStatus)
      Updates the ServerStatus of the specified repoName.

    • createCertificate

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> createCertificate(Author author, String appId, String certificateId, boolean isSystemAdmin)
      Creates a new app identity CertificateAppIdentity with the specified appId and certificateId.

    • destroyCertificate

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> destroyCertificate(Author author, String appId)
      Removes the CertificateAppIdentity of the specified appId. This sets AppIdentity.deletion() to the current timestamp. It will be purged later by purgeAppIdentity(Author, String).

    • activateCertificate

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> activateCertificate(Author author, String appId)
      Activates the CertificateAppIdentity of the specified appId.

    • deactivateCertificate

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> deactivateCertificate(Author author, String appId)
      Deactivates the CertificateAppIdentity of the specified appId.

    • updateAppIdentityLevel

      public CompletableFuture<Revision> updateAppIdentityLevel(Author author, String appId, boolean toBeSystemAdmin)
      Updates the app identity level of the specified appId.
